# AstroVedansh

> AstroVedansh (astrovedansh.org) is a Vedic astrologer, numerologist and life counsellor
> trusted by over 1 lakh clients in India and abroad. The practice offers personalised
> astrology and numerology reports, one-on-one call consultations, online puja services,
> energised sacred tools (rudraksha, gemstones, yantras) and practical remedies.

## Signature products
- [Perfect Career Report](https://perfect-career.astrovedansh.com/): astrology-based profession
  roadmap for students, job professionals and business owners — best profession, income source,
  job/business direction, skills and avoidable fields. Uses birth chart, astro-numerology and
  hand analysis.
- [Perfect Timing Report](https://perfect-timing.astrovedansh.com/): ask one life question
  (marriage, job, promotion, business, relationship, finance) and receive a 3-page answer with
  analysis, a timing window and remedies.

## Services
- [Call Consultation](https://astrovedansh.org/consultation): birth-chart reading, career &
  business guidance, relationship & marriage matching, remedies. 15/30/60-minute plans.
- [Personalised Numerology Report](https://astrovedansh.org/numerology-report): 25-year
  predictions, lucky numbers/dates/colours/stones, name correction.
- [Online Puja Services](https://astrovedansh.org/online-puja-services): Navagraha Shanti,
  Rahu-Ketu dosh nivaran, Mangal dosh shanti, Sade Sati puja and more, performed live with vidhi.
- [Shop](https://astrovedansh.org/shop): certified, energised rudraksha, gemstones, yantras,
  bracelets and kavach.

## Free tools
- [Free Kundli Calculator](https://astrovedansh.org/free-kundli-calculator): moon rashi,
  nakshatra, birth tithi, mulank and bhagyank.
- [Daily Horoscope](https://astrovedansh.org/horoscope/daily) and
  [Horoscope 2026](https://astrovedansh.org/horoscope/2026) for all 12 rashis.
- [Panchang](https://astrovedansh.org/panchang): tithi, nakshatra, yoga, karana, rahu kaal.

## Learn
- [Blog](https://astrovedansh.org/blog): plain-language guides on astrology, numerology,
  panchang, gemstones and remedies.
- [About](https://astrovedansh.org/about) · [Contact](https://astrovedansh.org/contact) —
  email reports.team@astrovedansh.com.
